name: tinyai-observability-copilot
description: Native VS Code extension for Copilot/Claude TinyAI coding telemetry.

tinyaiObservability.collectorUrl.description: TinyAI observability collector URL. Localhost and private LAN IPs may use HTTP for team testing; public collectors must use HTTPS with a bearer token.

tinyaiObservability.token.description: Collector bearer token. Required for public collectors; localhost and private LAN collectors may use HTTP without a token.

tinyaiObservability.userName.description: Required teammate display name used to group all sessions for the same user in TinyAI Observability.

tinyaiObservability.userId.description: Optional stable teammate ID. If empty, TinyAI uses userEmail, then userName.

tinyaiObservability.userEmail.description: Optional teammate email used for identity disambiguation.

tinyaiObservability.team.description: Optional team or group name for reporting.

tinyaiObservability.captureConversationT.description: Capture full conversation text for TinyAI-owned chat surfaces and imported Copilot/Claude transcripts.

tinyaiObservability.captureVisibleReason.description: Capture visible or locally persisted AI reasoning/process text from Copilot/Claude transcripts. turn_snapshot stores only reasoning text actually persisted by the local AI tool.

tinyaiObservability.autoCaptureCopilotLo.description: Automatically capture local GitHub Copilot Chat transcript JSONL files from VS Code workspaceStorage.

tinyaiObservability.autoCaptureClaudeLoc.description: Automatically capture local Claude Code project JSONL files from ~/.claude/projects and ~/.claude/transcripts. Captures Claude turns from VS Code Claude panels, Claude Code, and Claude CLI when those logs are written locally.

tinyaiObservability.autoCaptureCopilotCo.description: Automatically capture per-turn code changes from Copilot tool-call edit payloads and VS Code text document changes. This excludes pre-existing workspace git diff.

tinyaiObservability.enableClaudeWorkspac.description: Advanced: allow Claude transcript capture to upload turn-end workspace git diff fallback evidence. Disabled by default to avoid attributing pre-existing workspace changes to the current Claude turn.

tinyaiObservability.autoInstallGitHooks.description: Automatically install or refresh non-destructive TinyAI Git hooks for AI line fingerprints, commit snapshots, and push snapshots when a Git workspace opens.

tinyaiObservability.autoCaptureRecentMin.description: Only auto-capture Copilot/Claude transcript files modified within this many minutes. This keeps startup scans focused on recent work instead of backfilling old chats.

chatParticipants.name: tinyai
chatParticipants.description: Use personal specs and capture coding telemetry

disambiguation.description: Requests that should read TinyAI or OpenSpec personal specs before coding, compare personal specs with official specs, or capture AI coding telemetry.
examples: 按个人 specs 修改订单状态逻辑
先读取个人知识库再修复这个 bug
根据 openspec 里的 workspace spec 实现这个需求
对比 official 和 personal spec 后改代码
按项目知识库规则完成这个任务

languageModelTools.name: tinyai_specs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search TinyAI/OpenSpec personal specs and catalog for relevant project rules. Use this before coding when the user mentions personal specs, specs, OpenSpec, project knowledge, catalog, workspace rules, official-vs-personal spec differences, or domain logic that may be documented in the knowledge base. The tool also records direct specs telemetry for observability.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search TinyAI personal specs and record specs telemetry.

query.description: The user's coding or analysis request to search in TinyAI/OpenSpec specs.

scripts.package: npm run compile && npx vsce package --allow-missing-repository
